name: Crustless Jarlsberg Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium-low heat. Add the flour and stir just until the mixture bubbles.
3. Slowly add milk, stirring constantly. Stir in baking powder, mustard, and salt into cottage cheese.
4. Beat eggs well, then beat in softened cream cheese and cottage cheese mixture.
5. Slowly beat in cream sauce, then thoroughly incorporate Jarlsberg and Parmesan.
6. Pour the mixture into two buttered 10-inch pie plates.
7. Bake for about 45 minutes or until puffed and browned.
8. Cut each quiche into eight large wedges.
